sources.description: Light blue blazer, headset, laptop; subject right
sources.recommendedUse: Needs careful layout — 4:5 face-right only if face fully visible

video.recommended_script_style: practice operations POV — missed calls scenario
video.video_editor_notes: Use subject-center crops only for video. Text-led native ad. Not first-batch video hero.
video.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Office admin at laptop with headset. Side angle. No testimonial framing.
compliance_risks: Do not use fake customer voice

sources.description: Teal blouse, headset, laptop; subject left, right negative space
sources.recommendedUse: First-batch — missed calls, scheduling, front desk backup

video.recommended_script_style: front desk backup scenario / voiceover over office scene
video.video_editor_notes: Strong 9:16 and 4:5. Leave right negative space for text animation. Light Ken Burns.
video.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Professional admin with headset at laptop, calm multitasking in bright healthcare office.

sources.description: Teal blouse, headset, laptop, workflow icons — quality standard
sources.recommendedUse: Top priority — face-left 4:5 and subject-left 9:16 are the benchmark

video.recommended_script_style: practice operations POV / remote medical assistant explainer
video.video_editor_notes: Quality standard for video. IMG_AI_003_4X5_FACE_LEFT and 9X16_SUBJECT_LEFT are benchmark frames. VO only — not on-camera testimonial.
video.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Medical office admin with headset handling calls and follow-up at laptop. Professional, calm, no patient data visible.
compliance_risks: Workflow icons may clash with motion text — simplify in edit

sources.description: Teal scrubs, headset, laptop; taller source (1024×819)
sources.recommendedUse: First-batch — strong vertical candidate

video.video_editor_notes: Best vertical crop family after AI_003. Use for hiring gap / admin capacity angles.
video.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Healthcare admin in scrubs with headset working at laptop. Organized office workflow.
compliance_risks: Stethoscope visible — ops angle only, not clinical care

sources.description: Navy scrubs with teal trim; floating icons
sources.recommendedUse: Usable with careful text placement — icons compete with copy

video.video_editor_notes: Remove or fade floating icons in video edit. Text on left side only.
video.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Office manager at desk with laptop, healthcare admin support role.

sources.description: Navy scrubs; subject right, left negative space
sources.recommendedUse: Side-rail layout — subject-center crops only

video.video_editor_notes: Subject-center crops for video. Text rail on left. Phase 2 video batch.
video.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Admin reviewing documents at desk, healthcare office setting.
compliance_risks: Do not show real insurance documents or PHI

sources.description: Blue scrubs, stethoscope, headset; subject left — strongest family
sources.recommendedUse: Top priority — headset + laptop work context

video.recommended_script_style: remote medical assistant explainer / practice operations POV
video.video_editor_notes: Top video family with AI_010. Use for talking-head FRAME with VO only. 9:16 subject-left is primary vertical seed.
video.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Medical admin in blue scrubs with headset at laptop. Call handling and scheduling context. No patients in frame.

sources.description: Desk scene with charts; subject right
sources.recommendedUse: Background/support — subject-center crops only

video.recommended_script_style: checklist reveal / voiceover over desk scene

video.veo_prompt_notes: Draft: Medical office desk with charts and laptop — generic, no readable data.
compliance_risks: Charts may imply unverified cost claims

sources.description: Teal blouse, headset, workflow icons; clean face
sources.recommendedUse: First-batch — scheduling bottleneck, admin backlog

video.video_editor_notes: Primary image for scheduling video concept. Calendar icon can animate in post — simplify source icons.

sources.description: Blue scrubs, headset; subject left, right negative space

sources.description: Light blue blouse; subject right, floating icons
sources.recommendedUse: Split layout only — reject edge crops

sources.description: Teal blouse; chin at risk, awkward crops
